allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap $screen.Width, $screen.Height; $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\); $bmp.Save\("C:\\Temp\\screenshot1.png"\); Write-Output "Screenshot saved")
PowerShell(python -c "from PIL import Image; print\('PIL OK'\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(Start-Process python -ArgumentList "main.py" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\production scheduler"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; python C:\\temp\\grab_app.py)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); cd "C:\\production scheduler" && git push origin master 2>&1)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\production scheduler"; $env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); $proc = Start-Process -FilePath python -ArgumentList "main.py" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; if \(!$proc.HasExited\) { "앱 실행 중 \(PID $\($proc.Id\)\) — 정상 기동" } else { "종료됨. 종료코드: $\($proc.ExitCode\)" })

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); cd "C:\\production scheduler"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath python -ArgumentList "main.py" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; if \(!$proc.HasExited\) { "앱 실행 중 \(PID $\($proc.Id\)\)" } else { "종료. 코드: $\($proc.ExitCode\)" })

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); cd "C:\\production scheduler" && git add .gitignore && git commit -m "chore: add .planner.pid to .gitignore" && git push origin master 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); cd "C:\\production scheduler"; $p1 = Start-Process -FilePath python -ArgumentList "main.py" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; "첫 번째 인스턴스 PID: $\($p1.Id\), 실행중: $\(!$p1.HasExited\)")

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); cd "C:\\production scheduler"; $p2 = Start-Process -FilePath python -ArgumentList "main.py" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; "두 번째 인스턴스 PID: $\($p2.Id\), 실행중: $\(!$p2.HasExited\)")

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); $p1 = Get-Process -Id 7080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $p2 = Get-Process -Id 6284 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "첫 번째\(7080\): $\(if \($p1\) { '실행중' } else { '종료됨' }\)"; "두 번째\(6284\): $\(if \($p2\) { '실행중' } else { '종료됨' }\)")

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); cd "C:\\production scheduler" && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: update local settings" && git push origin master 2>&1)
